Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For Order To Distribute Settment Funds;
Off Calendar Apr-07-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromises hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Jennifer Berg, Esq. for Petitioner: Constance Soares, also present as Guardian at litem for: Stephan Dokken and Taylor Pachecano, minor Claimants.
Parties were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each minors as follows:
Attorney's Fees $3,200.15
Costs $856.75
A net balance of $9,600.45 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Antioch Branch, 1750 A Street, Antioch, CA. 94509, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account received in court and to be signed by Comm. Kaplan.
4:30 P.M.
Orders signed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For Order To Distribute Settment Funds;

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds And Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Continued To Apr-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment of Settlement Funds and Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Jennifer Berg, Esq. for Petitioner: Constance Soares, also present as Guardian at litem for: Stephan Dokken; Taylor Pachecano; Heather Pachecano and Brooke Crowell, minor Claimants.
Angela Sabloff and Scott Soares, adult children of the decedent are present in pro per.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court hears testimony by the parties and counsel, taken the Motion for Apportionment of Settlement Funds under submission, the Minors' Compromise Hearing continued to April 7, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.

March 4, 2005
Order Distributing Settlement Funds granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see details in scanned doc.
